name: Vercel Grep MCP
description: Searches millions of public GitHub repositories for real-world code patterns and API usage examples using literal or regex queries. No key needed.

skills.name: Code Pattern Search
skills.description: Searches millions of public GitHub repositories for literal code strings or regex patterns across any language.

skills.name: Regex Code Search
skills.description: Applies full regular expressions including multiline and dotall flags to find complex code patterns in production repos.

skills.name: Language-Filtered Search
skills.description: Narrows code searches by programming language, repository name, or file path to get targeted, relevant results.
